mnemonics: CPU TURNAROUND TIME (CT): Count The Turns. CPU utilization, Throughput, Turnaround time, Waiting time, Response time
keyPoints: CPU Utilization: Keep the CPU as busy as possible.
Throughput: Maximize the number of processes completed per time unit.
Turnaround Time: Minimize the time from submission to completion of a process.
Waiting Time: Minimize the time a process spends waiting in the ready queue.
Response Time: Minimize the time from submission until the first response is produced.
commonMistakes: Confusing turnaround time with response time (turnaround is total time, response is time to first output).
Prioritizing one metric (e.g., CPU utilization) without considering the negative impact on others (e.g., response time).
Assuming a lower waiting time always means a lower turnaround time (turnaround time = waiting time + burst time).
